summary: Pulse format definitions for dual-agent communication. PulseH (Heartbeat→Reactive, every 15s): carries memory_root_hash, soul_version, last_verified_event, alive flag. PulseR (Reactive→Heartbeat, every 5 actions): carries last_action_hash, tool_result_hash, action_count. Both use HEARTBEAT/v1 protocol. compute_soul_version() creates SHA-256 digest of concatenated soul law hashes for integrity tracking.
